title: lonchostoma monogynum
intro: Lonchostoma monogynum, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its small, round leaves and yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lonchostoma monogynum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine practices, such as Ayurveda and Unani, to promote overall well-being.
